overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval European harbor town. The character moves from narrow cobblestone alleys up wooden stairs, through covered walkways, and along the bustling waterfront with docked sailing ships. The scene features detailed historic architecture with timber-framed houses and stone buildings under bright sunny skies.

events.description: character begins ascending wooden stairs to reach elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow cobblestone alleyway and climbing wooden stairs to upper level

entered.detail: two-story medieval building with exposed wooden beams and plaster walls
tall stone building with small arched windows and weathered texture
irregular cobblestone street with patches of grass between stones
steep wooden staircase with railings leading to upper platform
large tied sacks of hay stacked against the stone building

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow cobblestone alley between a timber-framed tavern on the left and a stone warehouse on the right. The alley is empty of other people. At around 7 seconds, he begins ascending a steep wooden staircase leading to an elevated walkway, with hay bales visible stacked against the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden walkway along stone building wall

events.description: entering covered wooden pergola walkway with shaded lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated wooden platform beside stone building wall, approaching covered passage

entered.detail: elevated wooden planks forming a walkway along the building side
overhead wooden beam structure providing partial cover
wooden cargo crates piled against the stone wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated wooden walkway attached to the stone warehouse wall, the camera moves through a partially covered wooden pergola structure. The lighting becomes more diffused as the character moves under the overhead beams. Stacked wooden crates line the right side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor waterfront with docked ships

events.description: exiting covered walkway into bright open harbor with ships and water visible
moving from shaded cover into direct sunlight illuminating the harbor

agents.ego_description: walking along the harbor front cobblestone quay, passing NPCs and approaching docked ships

notable_agents.action: woman in red and white dress walking ahead along the quay

entered.detail: calm blue water of the harbor basin reflecting the sky
large medieval sailing vessel with white sails docked at the quay
skyline of the town with church spires and towers across the water
wide cobblestone waterfront promenade along the harbor edge
large spherical iron cage structure on the dockside

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a bright sunlit harbor. A large sailing ship with white sails is docked to the left on the calm blue water, while the distant city skyline with towers spans the horizon. The character walks along the cobblestone quay, following a woman in a red dress, with other pedestrians and dock workers visible along the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden dock walkway under warehouse awning

events.description: entering covered wooden dock area with overhead shelter

agents.ego_description: walking under covered wooden walkway along the dock, passing various NPCs and workers

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress continuing to walk ahead under the covered dock

entered.detail: overhead wooden roof structure covering the dock walkway
dark wooden planks of the warehouse building with vertical beams
large wooden harbor crane with beam and pulley system
stacked wooden barrels and cargo along the warehouse wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open quay into a covered wooden dock walkway with overhead shelter, creating darker diffused lighting. The wooden warehouse wall runs along the right side with stacked barrels, while a large wooden harbor crane becomes visible ahead. The woman in the red dress continues walking ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open town square with canal and timber houses

events.description: passing large wooden crane structure and entering open square

agents.ego_description: walking past the harbor crane into a town square area, observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: townsman in simple clothing walking past the character

entered.detail: cluster of medieval half-timbered houses with white plaster and dark beams
narrow water canal running alongside the cobblestone path
grassy bank with small plants between the path and canal
stone building with arched doorway and small windows

segments.scene_description: Passing the large wooden harbor crane, the character enters an open town square featuring charming timber-framed houses on the left and a small canal with grassy banks on the right. The scene transitions back to full sunlight with clear skies. Various townspeople walk through the square, and the architecture shifts from harbor warehouses to residential buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the secluded shadows of narrow alleys into the bright, bustling activity of a sunlit harbor town. It begins with Geralt walking through a quiet cobblestone alley between a timber-framed tavern and a stone warehouse before ascending a steep wooden staircase past stacked hay bales. As he reaches an elevated walkway, the scene shifts through a partially covered pergola where the lighting becomes diffused and wooden crates line the path. The view then opens abruptly into a brilliant sunlit harbor featuring a large sailing ship on calm blue water and a distant city skyline, as the camera follows a woman in a red dress along a crowded cobblestone quay. Finally, the movement passes through a shaded dock walkway and under a large wooden harbor crane, emerging into an open town square filled with residential timber-framed houses and a small canal under a clear sky.
